headline: Forget Generic Gaming Plays: 3 ETFs Reveal the Real Digital Entertainment Divide
summary: Digital entertainment has grown into one of the largest discretionary categories for consumers, and it continues to draw more time and attention every year. Video games, esports, live streaming, and online wagering all compete for the same hours, even though the companies behind them look very different. A handful of ETFs try to capture pieces ... Forget Generic Gaming Plays: 3 ETFs Reveal the Real Digital Entertainment Divide
